convertedFeatures.detail: OpenAI/NestJS call pattern translated to Apps Script UrlFetchApp with Script Properties.
Conversations/messages/history and plan message limits translated to Sheets.
Auth/session flow translated to salted Apps Script hash and Sheets sessions.
Active conversation, optimistic send, typing behavior, local state.
Floating chat and online status converted to dependency-free JS.
Embeddable widget locked to Apps Script deployment URL.
GitHub scanning, file indexing, tasks, voice simulation, notifications, and AI bridge retained and expanded.
